description: Up your semi-formal style statement with this leather wallet from wrangler. Stylish, yet practical, this wallet makes for a fab accessory. Open width: 22.5 Height: 9 cm Made of leather with a mat pattern and strap on the upper Two main compartments to hold currency notes Left flap has two side compartments and card holders on top Right flap has one side compartment and a coin pouch above it with a press button flap closure Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
